should_trigger.input: We have an outage and don't know what caused it
should_trigger.reason: Unknown-cause incident — investigation structure is needed

should_trigger.input: Error rate spiked at 3pm, help me figure out why
should_trigger.reason: Requests investigation of a time-correlated anomaly

should_trigger.input: Something is wrong in production but I can't pinpoint the cause

should_not_trigger.input: Fix this known bug in the payment handler
should_not_trigger.reason: Known issue with a clear fix — implement-changes is appropriate

should_not_trigger.input: Review my code for potential performance issues
should_not_trigger.reason: Code review is review-changes, not incident investigation
